literature.source: PD resting-state EEG literature + OpenNeuro ds002778 target

honesty: Signal stats are lightweight local proxies (not clinical PSD diagnosis). OpenNeuro ds002778 metadata/priors used when full EDF absent. Failure probe is substrate lesion engineering.
